escalateWhen: verifyBeforeNext command fails twice on the same item after one Composer fix attempt
item touches functions/src/, firestore.rules, or pickup/delivery CF eligibility logic (run Sonnet 4.6 security review Task before push)
item tier is T2+ and changes auth, Firestore writes, or transaction/idempotency behavior
acceptance criteria cannot be met without schema or rules change not listed in item scope — mark blocked, do not widen scope
executionProtocol.instructions: Follow PROJECT_STATUS/AWAY_BUILD_PROTOCOL.md. After each item: npm run away:ship -- --id <id> --note "..." then npm run away:validate.

queue.title: Phase 6 slice 3: Gmail reply sync / watch (spec only)
queue.scope: Gmail push/watch + inbound reply thread sync to Vendor Communications drawer. SPEC ONLY — do not implement until Dan queues and approves. Not blocked by ESL/shop map.
queue.acceptance: Written spec only: watch setup, inbound reply matching, drawer thread display, security review checklist. No CF/UI implementation in this item.

queue.title: Mini-librarian: slim execution packet (Action 1)
queue.scope: Remove default svscope_simple.md from buildNextBrief() readFirst in scripts/lib/away-memory-lib.mjs. Document npm run away:next -- --minimal as default for coding sessions in PROJECT_STATUS/MEMORY.md (one router row). Optional away item flag scopeDispute: true may add svscope to readFirst later — do not implement flag unless trivial. ESL/shop map blockers do not apply.
queue.acceptance: buildNextBrief() readFirst no longer includes svscope_simple.md by default; MEMORY.md has one row pointing token-efficiency / away:next --minimal default; npm run away:next -- --minimal returns id/title/scope without svscope in readFirst; npm run away:validate passes.

queue.title: Mini-librarian: planning path dedup (Action 2)
queue.scope: Update planning scout protocol in .cursor/rules/parallel-agent-strategy.mdc: Scout A runs npm run away:next -- --minimal first; skip 2–4 scouts when queue head answers what's next; index-only MODEL_DOSSIER (lines 7–23 + one § by tag) in scout table. Add suggestion-verify reuse clause to .cursor/rules/suggestion-verify-gate.mdc (1–2 lines: do not re-read sources scouts already cited this turn unless contradiction suspected). No product code changes.
queue.acceptance: parallel-agent-strategy.mdc scout table documents away:next --minimal, skip-when-queue-head-answers, and index-only dossier; suggestion-verify-gate.mdc has explicit reuse clause; npm run away:validate passes.

queue.title: Mini-librarian: extend context-index for roadmap + project_state (Action 3)
queue.scope: Extend PROJECT_STATUS/context-index.json with index→slice entries for key sections of docs/roadmap.md (NOW, NEXT, LATER headers) and docs/project_state.md (Current Phase, Immediate Next Steps, Known Issues). Update context-lookup.mjs (or shared indexer lib) to slice by line range like dossier:slice. Add away:validate checks for context-index line ranges (same pattern as dossier-index). ESL/shop map blockers do not apply.
queue.acceptance: context-index.json has startLine/endLine entries for ≥3 roadmap sections and ≥3 project_state sections; npm run context:lookup -- --concern "roadmap now" (or equivalent) prints sliced excerpt not full file; away:validate validates context-index ranges with warnings on drift; npm run away:validate passes.
